fields.explainZh: 设备序列号，设备的唯一标识。

fields.explainEn: Running status of the current system.

fields.explainZh: 存储设备的总容量。单位是兆字节（MB）。
fields.explainEn: Total capacity of the storage device in MB.

fields.explainZh: 存储设备已使用容量，单位是兆字节（MB）。
fields.explainEn: Used capacity of the storage device in MB.
Index of the board where the FC port resides.

fields.explainZh: FC主机端口配置速率，单位是1000 Mbps。
fields.explainEn: Configured rate of the FC port in 1000 Mbps. The value 0 indicates autonegotiation. The value -1 indicates invalid rate.
Logic type of the FC port.
Port mode of the FC port.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发地址的索引，取值为0到3。
fields.explainEn: Index of the trap forwarding address, in the range of 0 to 3.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发的IP地址，只支持IPv4格式地址。
fields.explainEn: Trap forwarding IP address. Only IPv4 address format is supported.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发地址的端口号，取值为1到65535。
fields.explainEn: Port number of the trap forwarding address, in the range of 1 to 65535.
Version of the trap forwarding address.

fields.explainZh: 告警转发的IP新地址，支持IPv4或IPv6格式地址。
fields.explainEn: New trap forwarding IP address. Both IPv4 and IPv6 address formats are supported.
ID of the slot where the logical disk resides.
Running status of the logical disk.
Working mode of the physical disk.
Serial number of the physical disk.
ID of the slot where the physical disk resides.
Running status of the physical disk.
High water mark of the Cache.
Low water mark of the Cache.
Total capacity of the Cache in MB.
Combined index of the host port.

fields.explainZh: 主机端口的IP地址，返回“--”表示无效。
fields.explainEn: IP address of the host port. Two hyphens (--) means invalid address.
Physical type of the host port.
ID of the controller node that owns the LUN.
ID of the storage pool to which the LUN belongs.
Operating rate of the SAS port.
Index of the board where the SAS port resides.

fields.explainZh: SAS主机端口速率，单位是1000 Mbps。
fields.explainEn: Configured rate of the SAS port in 1000 Mbps. The value -1 means invalid rate.
Logic type of the SAS port.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
